DELETE /accounts/{account_id}/access/ai-.description: Deletes an MCP portal from the account.

allow_code_mode.description: Allow remote code execution in Dynamic Workers (beta)

description.example: This is my custom MCP Portal

secure_web_gateway.description: Route outbound MCP traffic through Zero Trust Secure Web Gateway

200.description: Returns the Object if it was successfully deleted

GET /accounts/{account_id}/access/ai-con.description: Lists all MCP portals configured for the account.

allow_code_mode.description: Allow remote code execution in Dynamic Workers (beta)

description.example: This is my custom MCP Portal

secure_web_gateway.description: Route outbound MCP traffic through Zero Trust Secure Web Gateway

description.example: This is one remote mcp server

is_upstream.description: True = MCP server returned an error. False = couldn't reach the server

retryable.description: Whether the error is transient and worth retrying

status_code.description: HTTP status code from the server

is_shared_oauth_callback_enabled.description: When true, the gateway worker uses the shared Cloudflare-owned OAuth callback endpoint as the redirect_uri for upstream on-behalf OAuth, instead of the customer portal hostname. Defaults to false (off); opt in per server by setting true. Effective behavior is gated by the gateway worker's per-env rollout mode KV key.

secure_web_gateway.description: Route outbound traffic to this MCP server through Zero Trust Secure Web Gateway

status.description: Current sync state of the server
